title: WynnExperience
description: [1.21.1] A simple & fast Wynncraft Client that may refresh your gameplay.
body:
# Why did I made this modpack

The reason is quite simple, I have tried lots of modpacks like Wynncraft101, Wynncraft Ultimate (those modpack are fine, just some details didn't feel perfect), they just disappointed me in someplace. So I created this modpack, I wish this modpack can make a "nearly perfect" experience.

# The version difference

There has two different version: **Full** version & **Lite** version.

||Full Version|Lite Version|
|---|---|---|
|Performance|Kinda bad|Great|
|Visuals|Good|Normal|
|Utilities|Full|Basic|

# Usage

## Auto Download LOD Files

Thanks to [WynnLODGrabber](https://modrinth.com/mod/wynnlodgrabber), we now have an easy way to get full LOD files ingame.

If you clicked "Maybe later" first time the Game ask, you may need to delete the config file to make LODGrabber pop the dialog again.

## Manually messing with the LOD file

Distant Horizon file Download: [Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PRnIGv2DHN_S8H3ur_QYEUMvBGu-NLPl/view?usp=sharing)

This mapfile is NOT containing "The Realm of Light" and "the Silent Expanse" because I'm not grinding that much and didn't have access to there. File may outdated (Last updates: Jan. 2024)

# Keybinds Manuals for v1.0.*

Most of settings are remains vanilla, some mod's keybinds has been modified.

|Key|Usage|
|-----|-----|
|`CapsLock`|Enable Auto-Run|
|`LShift`|when hover on an item, hold `LShift` to make a comparison with equipped|
|`C`|Use Zoom|
|`RAlt`|Modify the distance of Third Person View|
|`RShift`|Open Xaero's World Map|
|`F6`/`F7`|Custom Third Person Cam 1/2|
|`F9`|Screenshot in 4K (Farbicshot)|
